market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Cozy 1-Bed Home Next to City Center
analysis.rewritten_desc: Enjoy this stylish one-bedroom apartment just moments from [City Name]’s top attractions. Priced at £89/night—50% below the local market average—this listing offers incredible value for 4 travelers. While photos show a warm, modern interior with functional space for two. Pro tip: The market median occupancy for similar properties is 48% (you’re currently at 23%), suggesting untapped potential to boost bookings. Guests praise the convenience of being ‘next door’ to key amenities, with 74 travelers awarding an impressive 4.95 rating. Note: To match nearby listings' appeal, consider adding missing outdoor space, parking confirmation, or entertainment features.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize an exterior photo with visible entryway to establish safety and location cues. Follow with the brightest room that demonstrates spatial flow, as the current lead image may be too small/cropped to convey true layout.
key_diagnosis: Your £89 rate (-42% vs £155 median) isn't translating to better occupancy (23% vs cohort median 48%)
Title lacks SEO value—'Next Door' is vague and not location-specific
No amenities listed under Outdoor/Parking/Entertainment categories that could explain low occupancy
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £89 rate is 42% lower than the local median, yet occupancy remains 23% (vs cohort average 48% for similar homes).
